newsItem.headline: Man Utd, Newcastle intensify Diomande interest; €50M fee acceptable to Sporting

newNews.reasoning: New transfer update showing Man Utd and Newcastle as primary contenders with €50M fee; differs from Apr 19 report which mentioned multiple suitors post-UCL. This represents evolved interest with specific fee guidance.

newsItem.headline: Faye delivers dominant 90-min display: 3 tackles, clean sheet vs Marseille

newNews.reasoning: Detailed performance analysis distinguishes this from Apr 19 generic appearance record. Provides tactical context (high line positioning, 8 clearances, 1 interception) not in existing news.

statusChanges.source: RotoWire, Wikipedia (Apr 19, 2026) — Faye completed rehabilitation in January 2026 and has returned to consistent competitive appearances with clean sheets. Current data shows full 90-minute performances and defensive contributions in Ligue 1.
